mapper.sql: SELECT id, storage_code, storage_name, warehouse_id, location_id, storage_type, capacity, is_enabled, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM sys_storage WHERE isdeleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_storage( storage_code, storage_name, warehouse_id, location_id, storage_type, capacity, is_enabled, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{storageCode}, #{storageName}, #{warehouseId}, #{locationId}, #{storageType}, #{capacity}, #{isEnabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_storage
storage_code = #{storageCode}, storage_name = #{storageName}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, location_id = #{locationId}, storage_type = #{storageType}, capacity = #{capacity}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
UPDATE sys_storage SET isdeleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
UPDATE sys_storage SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
